entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The causal agent of downy mildew disease in pearl millet, a fungal pathogen analyzed for genetic diversity.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The host crop affected by downy mildew disease.

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease of pearl millet caused by the fungus Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: ISSR MARKERS
entities.description: Inter simple sequence repeat markers used for DNA polymorphism assessment and genetic fingerprinting.

entities.name: DNA POLYMORPHISM
entities.description: The variation in DNA sequences among different isolates of Sclerospora graminicola.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The extent and pattern of genetic variation among Sclerospora graminicola isolates.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Sclerospora graminicola isolates were collected.

entities.name: UPGMA
entities.description: Unweighted pair group method of averages used to construct a dendrogram for clustering isolates.

entities.name: JACCARD'S COEFFICIENT
entities.description: A coefficient of similarity used as a basis for UPGMA dendrogram construction.

entities.name: PRINCIPAL COORDINATE ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to analyze genetic diversity and form clusters of isolates.

entities.name: NEI GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A standardized genetic distance measure used for UPGMA clustering.

entities.name: MULTI DIMENSIONAL SCALING
entities.description: A plotting method used to support UPGMA results and analyze variation among clusters.

entities.name: FINGERPRINTING
entities.description: The process of creating unique genetic profiles of organisms using molecular markers.
